blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,840 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.3" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
